data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for time window selection.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the time window selection (morning, afternoon, evening) for bookings. However, the linked use case only describes a booking for 'sometime this week' with a specific assignment to Wednesday, which does not provide sufficient evidence that the system allows for explicit time window selections. The evidence does not confirm that the system meets the requirement, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of explicit time window selection options (morning, afternoon, evening) for bookings.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the time window selection requirement.
